generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you hear about the recent cyberattack on our critical infrastructure? Experts say it was traced back to a state actor exploiting gaps in our alliance security protocols. We can't afford to rely on weak commitments from partners who won't stand with us when it counts. Remember the 2025 power grid breach? That happened because some allies refused to share intelligence in time. We need strong, reliable partners who will commit to mutual defense without hesitation. Our safety depends on it. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
